generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor (I_M) measuring electrical current of the robot axis motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder providing motor shaft angular position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox providing output shaft angular position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – DataTransmitted
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

// C10: Data (raw and derived)
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped motor current values streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped motor encoder angle values streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped gearbox encoder angle values streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler, MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque values calculated from motor current and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor and gearbox encoder angle traces"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real‑time streaming of sensor measurements"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionParameterIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing motor, gearbox and friction simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService, FrictionAwareModelUpdateService
]

instance SysMLToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling for structural asset modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for integrating models and data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAwareModelUpdateService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard visualizing measured and simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLAssetModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams describing motor, gearbox and cycloidal gearbox structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelCoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑Viscous friction model used for parameter identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelLuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for advanced identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model converting motor current to torque"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance VelocityDerivationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model deriving angular velocity from encoder angle traces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of measured and simulated data in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightFrictionBehavior
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) using white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionAdjustControlAlgorithm
]

instance FrictionAwareModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of friction‑aware model updates to improve motion control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionImprovePositioningAccuracy
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance InsightFrictionBehavior : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard provides operators with insight into friction behavior of the robot axis"
]

instance ActionAdjustControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters are used to adjust the robot’s control algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActionImprovePositioningAccuracy : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Friction‑aware model updates improve positioning accuracy of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow composed of an Asset (first axis), Sources (sensor channels), Processing components (simulation models) that consume input data traces and produce output data traces, and a Purpose (FrictionDerivation) linking all elements as defined in the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated phase – the digital shadow is created from live operational data to support runtime friction identification."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each data trace to its generating processing component and source, use of both analytical (white‑box) and data‑driven (black‑box) friction models, and comparison of simulated versus measured data to validate model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data is transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow over MQTT; Asset Administration Shells provide standardized metadata linking."
]
